indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Bacterial Vaginosis
Clindesse is indicated for the treatment of bacterial vaginosis (formerly referred to as
Haemophilus vaginitis, Gardnerella vaginitis, nonspecific vaginitis, Corynebacterium vaginitis,
or anaerobic vaginosis) in non-pregnant women.

10 OVERDOSAGE
1.1 Treatment of Bacterial Vaginosis
11 DESCRIPTION

1.1 Treatment of Bacterial Vaginosis
Clindesse is indicated for the treatment of bacterial vaginosis (formerly referred to as
Haemophilus vaginitis, Gardnerella vaginitis, nonspecific vaginitis, Corynebacterium vaginitis,
or anaerobic vaginosis) in non-pregnant women.
